traits_race.title: Race Traits
description: Race traits are tied to specific races. Your character must be of the specified race to select a race trait.

traits_religion.title: Religion Traits
description: Religion traits indicate that your character has an established faith in a specific deity; you need not be a member of a class that can wield divine magic to pick a religion trait, but you do have to have a patron deity and have some amount of religion in your background to justify this trait. Unlike the other categories of traits, religion traits can go away if you abandon your religion, as detailed under {rule/Restrictions on Trait Selection}.

data: Great Old One or Outer Gods

traits_regional.title: Regional Traits
description: Regional traits are tied to particular regions, often specific nations, territories, or cities in a campaign.
Some traits are available in multiple regions, so the numbers below won't add up to 447.
::main[Generic Regional Traits]{to=main/traits_generic bottom="desert, plains, urban, etc; 38 traits"}
::main[North Central Avistan]{to=main/traits_north_central_avistan bottom="Ustalav, Nirmathas, Belkzen, etc; 31 traits"}
::main[Northwestern Avistan]{to=main/traits_north_west_avistan bottom="Varisia, Irrisen, Linnorm Kings, etc; 52 traits"}
::main[Eye of Abendego]{to=main/traits_eye_of_abendego bottom="The Shackles, Sodden Lands, Mediogalti, etc; 28 traits"}
::main[Former Lung Wa Empire]{to=main/traits_lung_wa bottom="Chu Ye, Bachuan, Kaoling, etc; 25 traits"}
::main[Tian Xia]{to=main/traits_tian_xia bottom="Hwanggot, Valashmai, Wall of Heaven, etc; 34 traits"}
::main[Other Places on Golarion]{to=main/traits_other bottom="Anuli, Arcadia, Crown of the World; 5 traits"}
::main[Other Planes]{to=main/traits_extraplanar bottom="The Abyss, Elemental Planes, etc; 13 traits"}

traits_exemplar.title: Exemplar Traits
traits_exemplar.tags: Artist of Battle in All Forms Charming Smile Cunning Soul Curator of Mystic Secrets Faith Unshakable and Unassailable Traveler of a Hundred Lands
description: ## Artist of Battle in All Forms

You employ complex combat tactics with ease. Choose a type of combat maneuver. You gain a +1 trait bonus on combat maneuver checks to perform that maneuver, and you do not provoke an attack of opportunity from the target unless that creature has the appropriate Improved feat, such as {feat/Improved Grapple} if you attempt a combat maneuver check to grapple. For every two other combat traits you have, choose an additional type of combat maneuver to gain these benefits.

You know how to guilefully weave words, sway hearts and minds, verbally destroy rivals, and pierce cunning lies. You gain a +1 trait bonus on Bluff, Diplomacy, Intimidate, and Sense Motive checks. This bonus increases by 1 for every two other social traits you have.

Your broad collection of lore grants unparalleled understanding of magic's underlying principles. Twice per day when spontaneously casting a spell altered by metamagic, you can do so without increasing the spell's casting time. For each other magic trait you have, you can use this trait's benefit an additional time each day.

Your dedication to your ideals is stronger than steel. You gain a +2 trait bonus on Will saves against charm, compulsion, and fear effects. For every two other faith traits you have, this bonus increases by 1.

You have learned the ways of many lands. Choose any two skills; each of those skills becomes a class skill for you. For every other regional trait you have, select an additional skill to treat as a class skill.
